'''Tris''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and a [[Librarian/Legends|librarian]] of the [[Inrokini family]] on [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]]. She helped [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his expedition search through the [[Expeditionary Library]] to help find clues to the location of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].<ref name="FHII" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Personality and traits==
Tris was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] who had a thin body and short [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="FHII" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
